rationale: The citing paper uses Frederick, Lee, and Baskin (2014) as the main prior study it is responding to, summarizing its replication failures, mechanism account, and conclusion in the introduction. The authors explicitly state they provide additional independently collected evidence that supports those conclusions, and they repeatedly interpret their own results as an independent conceptual replication of that paper. This is a central framing and contribution-level role, not a passing background mention.
relation_description: The citing paper directly builds on Frederick et al. (2014) by testing the same core claim about limits of the attraction effect and providing additional replication evidence. It extends that line by showing attenuation with a broader set of nonnumeric representations, including qualitative-verbal descriptions in addition to pictorial depictions.
